author: Dr. Q + アンチョビ, Edited by Shoukang
description: SRPG area-of-effect skills--<Line of Sight>--

Cover System Plugin – Evaluates cover by checking adjacent tiles to the defender. If a cover tile (region 11, 12, or 13) is located between the attacker and defender, bonus modifiers are applied: Region 11 (def –10%, eva +5%, attacker hit –10%), Region 12 (def –15%, eva +7%, attacker hit –15%), Region 13 (def –20%, eva +10%, attacker hit –20%). Also prevents movement endpoints on cover tiles.

descriptions.ja: 指定イベントをマップの指定座標へ移動させるプラグインコマンドを追加します。

descriptions.ja: スイッチでピクチャの移動座標を絶対値と相対値とを切り替えられます。

descriptions.ja: 戦闘中のスキルの連続回数に関わらずアニメーション再生を1回にします。

descriptions.en: Turns off the TP display outside of the battle screen.
descriptions.ja: 戦闘画面以外のTP表示を消します。

author: munokura
description: Adds a plugin command that opens the specified URL in a new window.

descriptions.en: Adds a plugin command that opens the specified URL in a new window.
descriptions.ja: 新しいウィンドウに指定されたURLを開くプラグインコマンドを追加します。

author: munokura
description: Effekseerの未使用テクスチャを検出・整理します

author: munokura

descriptions.en: If you cancel in the party command window, you will be in the state where you chose to fight.
descriptions.ja: パーティコマンドウィンドウでキャンセル処理すると、戦うを選んだ状態になります。

descriptions.ja: 戦闘開始時にパーティコマンドをスキップし、アクターコマンドから開始します。

descriptions.en: ver1.00/Allows you to set Traits that control the adhesion rate of states.
descriptions.ja: ver1.00/ステートの付着率を操作する特徴を設定できるようにします。

author: Yana
description: ver1.01/Allows you to set effects that control the effect turn of states and strengthening/weakening.

descriptions.en: ver1.01/Allows you to set effects that control the effect turn of states and strengthening/weakening.
descriptions.ja: ver1.01/ステートや強化弱体の効果ターンを操作する効果を設定できるようにします。

author: Yana
description: ver1.01/Allows you to set Traits that control the effect turn of the state.

descriptions.en: ver1.01/Allows you to set Traits that control the effect turn of the state.
descriptions.ja: ver1.01/ステートの効果ターンを操作する特徴を設定することができるようにします。

author: Yana
description: ver1.00/When you enter the specified map, the set state will be canceled.

descriptions.en: ver1.00/When you enter the specified map, the set state will be canceled.
descriptions.ja: ver1.00/指定されたマップに入った時、設定されたステートを解除します。

author: Yana
description: ver1.00/It will now be possible to set a state on a map that will remain applied as long as you are within that map.

descriptions.en: ver1.00/It will now be possible to set a state on a map that will remain applied as long as you are within that map.
descriptions.ja: ver1.00/マップにそのマップ内にいる限り付与され続けるステートを設定できるようにします。

author: Yana
description: ver1.00/It will now be possible to set states that will not be canceled by being Collapse or fully recovered.

descriptions.en: ver1.00/It will now be possible to set states that will not be canceled by being Collapse or fully recovered.
descriptions.ja: ver1.00/戦闘不能や全回復で解除されないステートを設定できるようにします。

author: Yana
description: ver1.00/The icon will display the remaining number of turns for the actor's state and buffs.

descriptions.en: ver1.00/The icon will display the remaining number of turns for the actor's state and buffs.
descriptions.ja: ver1.00/アクターのステートやバフの残りターン数をアイコンに表示します。

author: Yana
description: ver1.03/Adds the ability to reserve common events when a state is granted or removed.

descriptions.en: ver1.03/Adds the ability to reserve common events when a state is granted or removed.
descriptions.ja: ver1.03/ステートが付与または解除された時に、コモンイベントを予約する特徴を追加します。

author: Yana
description: ver1.00/Makes it possible to manage multiple states as a group.

descriptions.en: ver1.00/Makes it possible to manage multiple states as a group.
descriptions.ja: ver1.00/複数のステートをグループとして管理することができるようにします。

author: Yana
description: ver1.03/Add help to states and a mechanism to view state details.

descriptions.en: ver1.03/Add help to states and a mechanism to view state details.
descriptions.ja: ver1.03/ステートにヘルプを付け、ステートの詳細を見るための仕組みを追加します。

author: Yana
description: ver1.03/You can now set Traits that temporarily grant states when taking action.

descriptions.en: ver1.03/You can now set Traits that temporarily grant states when taking action.
descriptions.ja: ver1.03/行動時に一時的にステートが付与される特徴を設定できるようにします。

author: Yana
description: ver1.00/It will be possible to set states that will be canceled when an attack hits, after an action, or when the action ends.

descriptions.en: ver1.00/It will be possible to set states that will be canceled when an attack hits, after an action, or when the action ends.
descriptions.ja: ver1.00/攻撃命中時、行動後、行動終了時解除されるステートを設定できるようにします。

author: Yana
description: ver1.00/Add SceneDistribution to the menu commands.

descriptions.ja: ver1.00/メニューコマンドにSceneDistributionを追加します。

description: ver1.00/Adds the number of attacks based on agility value.

descriptions.ja: イベントのランダム移動や近づく移動をより洗練された動きにします。
descriptions.ko: 이벤트의 랜덤 이동 및 접근 이동을 더 정교하게 만듭니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: allows toggling the airship's shadow on or off.

descriptions.en: allows toggling the airship's shadow on or off.
descriptions.ja: 飛行船の影の表示・非表示を切り替えられます。
descriptions.ko: 비행선 그림자 표시를 전환할 수 있습니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: change the message when all enemies have escaped.

descriptions.en: change the message when all enemies have escaped.
descriptions.ja: 敵が全員逃げて戦闘が終了した場合のメッセージを変更します。
descriptions.ko: 적이 모두 도망치고 전투가 종료된 경우의 메시지를 변경합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: Allows animation offset to be changed for each enemy.

descriptions.en: Allows animation offset to be changed for each enemy.
descriptions.ja: アニメーションのオフセットを敵ごとに変えられるようにします。
descriptions.ko: 애니메이션 오프셋을 적 캐릭터마다 변경할 수 있게 합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: automatically displays the face image in message.

descriptions.en: automatically displays the face image in message.
descriptions.ja: 「文章の表示」で顔グラフィックを自動的に表示します。
descriptions.ko: "텍스트 표시"에서 얼굴 이미지를 자동적으로 표시합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: hide or adjust the position of the cancel (back) button in battle.

descriptions.en: hide or adjust the position of the cancel (back) button in battle.
descriptions.ja: 戦闘画面でのキャンセル（戻る）ボタンを非表示または位置を調整します。
descriptions.ko: 전투 화면에서 취소(뒤로) 버튼을 숨기거나 위치를 조정합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: special processing at the end of battle.

descriptions.en: special processing at the end of battle.
descriptions.ja: 戦闘終了時に特殊処理を行うプラグインです。
descriptions.ko: 배틀 종료시에 특별한 처리를 실시합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: change the speed from minimum for each action.

descriptions.en: change the speed from minimum for each action.
descriptions.ja: 複数回行動時の速度補正の算出方法を各行動の最小値から変更します。
descriptions.ko: 여러 번 행동시 속도 보정을 각 행동의 최소치로부터 변경합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: apply a specific state in conjunction with buff / debuff.

descriptions.en: apply a specific state in conjunction with buff / debuff.
descriptions.ja: 能力強化・弱体に連動して特定のステートを付与します。
descriptions.ko: 능력 강화/약화에 연동하여 특정 스탯을 부여합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: Change individually the buff / debuff rates of the parameters.

descriptions.en: Change individually the buff / debuff rates of the parameters.
descriptions.ja: 能力値の強化・弱体の倍率を個別に変更します。
descriptions.ko: 능력치 강화/약체의 배율을 개별적으로 변경합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: change weapon equipment by the "Item" command in battle.

descriptions.en: change weapon equipment by the "Item" command in battle.
descriptions.ja: 戦闘中のアイテムコマンドに武器装備の変更機能を追加します。
descriptions.ko: 전투중의 "아이템"에 무기 장비 변경 기능을 추가합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: control with a switch if misses, evasions, critical hits can occur.

descriptions.en: control with a switch if misses, evasions, critical hits can occur.
descriptions.ja: 攻撃におけるミス、回避、会心の一撃の発生をスイッチで制御します。
descriptions.ko: 공격에서 실수, 회피, 치명타 발생을 스위치로 제어합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: control any self switches by plugin commands.

descriptions.en: control any self switches by plugin commands.
descriptions.ja: プラグインコマンドで任意のセルフスイッチを操作します。
descriptions.ko: 플러그인 명령에서 임의의 셀프스위치를 조작합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: turn ON/OFF the switches by the escape character.

descriptions.en: turn ON/OFF the switches by the escape character.
descriptions.ja: 制御文字でスイッチのON/OFF操作が行えるようにします。
descriptions.ko: 제어문자로 스위치의 ON/OFF를 조작할 수 있습니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: show the name and icon of item, skill or enemy etc. in messages.

descriptions.en: show the name and icon of item, skill or enemy etc. in messages.
descriptions.ja: 文章中にアイテムやスキル、敵キャラ等の名前やアイコンを表示します。
descriptions.ko: 텍스트중에 아이템이나 스킬, 적 캐릭터등의 이름과 아이콘을 표시합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: apply the text color when in a pinch to enemy names.

descriptions.en: apply the text color when in a pinch to enemy names.
descriptions.ja: ピンチ状態の時の文字色を敵キャラ名にも適用させます。
descriptions.ko: 핀치 상태일 때의 문자색을 적 캐릭터명에도 적용시킵니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: divide the text color when in a pinch into 2 levels.

descriptions.en: divide the text color when in a pinch into 2 levels.
descriptions.ja: ピンチ状態の時の文字色を2段階に分けます。
descriptions.ko: 핀치 상태일 때의 문자색을 2단계로 나눕니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: disables the message wait cancel function implemented in v1.8.

descriptions.en: disables the message wait cancel function implemented in v1.8.
descriptions.ja: v1.8で実装されたメッセージのウェイト無効化機能を無効化します。
descriptions.ko: v1.8로 구현된 메시지 웨이트 무효화 기능을 무효로 합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: when the switch is ON, disables fast forwarding by pressing OK button.

descriptions.en: when the switch is ON, disables fast forwarding by pressing OK button.
descriptions.ja: スイッチがONの時は決定キー押しっぱなしによる早送りを禁止します。
descriptions.ko: 스위치가 ON일 때는 확인 버튼을 눌러 고속화하는 기능을 무효로 합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: display an item icon in obtain items message at the end of the battle.

descriptions.en: display an item icon in obtain items message at the end of the battle.
descriptions.ja: 戦闘終了時のアイテム獲得メッセージにアイコンを表示します。
descriptions.ko: 전투 종료시의 아이템 획득 메세지에 아이콘을 표시합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: hides tiles (map chips) with the specified terrain tags in-game.

descriptions.en: hides tiles (map chips) with the specified terrain tags in-game.
descriptions.ja: 指定した地形タグのタイルを実際のゲーム画面で非表示にします。
descriptions.ko: 지정한 지형 태그의 타일(맵칩)을 실제 게임 내에서 표시하지 않습니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: to control the availability of items and skills with a switch.

descriptions.en: to control the availability of items and skills with a switch.
descriptions.ja: アイテムやスキルの使用可否をスイッチで制御できるようにします。
descriptions.ko: 아이템이나 스킬의 사용 여부를 스위치로 제어할 수 있도록 합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: allows screen shake to run indefinitely.

descriptions.en: allows screen shake to run indefinitely.
descriptions.ja: 画面のシェイクを永続的にできるようにします。
descriptions.ko: 화면 흔들기 효과를 무기한 지속할 수 있도록 합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: skips running event by plugin commands.

descriptions.en: skips running event by plugin commands.
descriptions.ja: プラグインコマンドで実行中のイベントをスキップします。
descriptions.ko: 플러그인 명령으로 실행중인 이벤트를 스킵합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: Enables to get off the airship even if it overlaps with dummy events.

descriptions.en: Enables to get off the airship even if it overlaps with dummy events.
descriptions.ja: ダミーイベントと重なる位置でも飛行船から下りられるようにします。
descriptions.ko: 더미 이벤트와 겹치는 위치에서도 비행선에서 내릴 수 있도록 합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: enhances the input number window.

descriptions.en: enhances the input number window.
descriptions.ja: 数値入力ウィンドウを強化するプラグインです。
descriptions.ko: 숫자 입력 윈도우를 강화하는 플러그인입니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: target rate lower than a certain value is considered 0%.

descriptions.en: target rate lower than a certain value is considered 0%.
descriptions.ja: 一定値以上低い狙われ率を0%と見なします。
descriptions.ko: 일정치 이상 낮은 표적이 될 확률을 0%로 간주합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: standardize item finding events.

descriptions.en: standardize item finding events.
descriptions.ja: アイテム発見イベントを規格化します。
descriptions.ko: 아이템 발견 이벤트를 표준화합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: Fixes that scripts in damage formulas is executed in auto battle.

descriptions.en: Fixes that scripts in damage formulas is executed in auto battle.
descriptions.ja: ダメージ計算式内のスクリプトが自動戦闘で実行されるのを解消します。
descriptions.ko: 데미지 계산식중 스크립트가 자동 전투에서 실행되는 것을 해소합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: adjusts actions when confusion-type states are added or removed.

descriptions.en: adjusts actions when confusion-type states are added or removed.
descriptions.ja: 混乱系ステートの付与・解除時に、そのターン内の行動を改善します。
descriptions.ko: 혼란 계열 상태가 부여/해제될 때 해당 턴의 행동을 개선합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: fixes issues with "One Ally (Any)" skills used by enemies and auto actors.

descriptions.en: fixes issues with "One Ally (Any)" skills used by enemies and auto actors.
descriptions.ja: 味方単体（無条件）のスキルが敵や自動戦闘で正常に動作しない不具合を修正します。
descriptions.ko: 아군 단일(무조건) 범위의 스킬이 적이나 자동 전투 때 문제를 수정합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: Fix a bug which the target of resurrection skill would not be random.

descriptions.en: Fix a bug which the target of resurrection skill would not be random.
descriptions.ja: 敵が使う蘇生スキルのターゲットがランダムにならない不具合を修正します。
descriptions.ko: 적이 쓰는 소생 스킬의 대상이 랜덤이 되지 않는 버그를 수정합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: Treat timers more strictly in units of the decimal point.

descriptions.en: Treat timers more strictly in units of the decimal point.
descriptions.ja: タイマーを小数点以下の単位でより厳密に判定します。
descriptions.ko: 타이머를 소수점 이하의 단위로 보다 엄격하게 판정합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: menu screen is disabled while getting on or off vehicle.

descriptions.en: menu screen is disabled while getting on or off vehicle.
descriptions.ja: 乗り物の乗降中はメニュー画面を禁止します。
descriptions.ko: 탈 것에 승강하는 중에는 메뉴 화면을 금지합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: plug-in command set to control the follower members.

descriptions.en: plug-in command set to control the follower members.
descriptions.ja: 隊列歩行のメンバーを操作するプラグインです。
descriptions.ko: 대열 보행 멤버를 조작하는 플러그인입니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: Hide equipments of the specified equipment type from the item list.

descriptions.en: Hide equipments of the specified equipment type from the item list.
descriptions.ja: 特定の装備タイプの装備品をアイテム一覧で非表示にします。
descriptions.ko: 지정한 장비유형의 장비품을 아이템 리스트에서 표시하지 않게 합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: Improve image preloading.

descriptions.en: Improve image preloading.
descriptions.ja: 画像の事前読み込みを改善します。
descriptions.ko: 이미지의 미리 불러오기를 개선합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: simplify changing the color of keywords in messages.

descriptions.en: simplify changing the color of keywords in messages.
descriptions.ja: 文章中で重要語句の文字色変更を簡略化できます。
descriptions.ko: 텍스트중에서 중요 단어의 글자 색 변경이 간단해집니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: set the detail action pattern of enemies who have multiple action.

descriptions.en: set the detail action pattern of enemies who have multiple action.
descriptions.ja: 敵キャラの複数回行動で単独行動や特定回のみ有効な行動を作ります。
descriptions.ko: 적의 여러 번 행동에서 1회 행동이나 특정회에만 유효한 행동을 만듭니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: set the detail action pattern of enemies who have multiple action.

descriptions.en: set the detail action pattern of enemies who have multiple action.
descriptions.ja: 敵キャラの複数回行動で単独行動や特定回のみ有効な行動を作ります。
descriptions.ko: 적의 여러 번 행동에서 1회 행동이나 특정회에만 유효한 행동을 만듭니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: display the nickname instead of the class name on status.

descriptions.en: display the nickname instead of the class name on status.
descriptions.ja: ステータス画面等で職業名の代わりに二つ名を表示します。
descriptions.ko: 정보 화면 등에서 클래스명 대신 닉네임을 표시합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: effects will not be applied if physical attack and HP damage is 0.

descriptions.en: effects will not be applied if physical attack and HP damage is 0.
descriptions.ja: 物理攻撃かつHPのダメージが0の場合は使用効果が付かないようにします。
descriptions.ko: 물리 공격 및 HP 데미지가 0인 경우 사용 효과도 붙지 않게 합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: prevents already-applied states from being re-applied.

descriptions.en: prevents already-applied states from being re-applied.
descriptions.ja: 既にかかっているステートには重複してかからないようにします。
descriptions.ko: 이미 부여된 상태는 중복으로 부여되지 않게 합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: prevents turn count reset when a param buff/debuff is at its limit.

descriptions.en: prevents turn count reset when a param buff/debuff is at its limit.
descriptions.ja: 能力値強化・弱体が上限に達していたら継続ターン数の更新を無効にします。
descriptions.ko: 능력치 강화/약화가 상한에 도달한 경우 지속 턴수 갱신을 무효화합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: controls TP gain when Substitute, Counter, or Magic Reflect occurs.

descriptions.en: controls TP gain when Substitute, Counter, or Magic Reflect occurs.
descriptions.ja: 身代わり・反撃・魔法反射によるTP獲得の有無を制御します。
descriptions.ko: 대신 맞기, 반격, 마법 반사에 의한 TP 획득 유무를 제어합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: if autonomous movement is "Custom", events move even off screen.

descriptions.en: if autonomous movement is "Custom", events move even off screen.
descriptions.ja: 画面外のイベントでも自律移動が「カスタム」の場合は動くようにします。
descriptions.ko: 화면 밖의 이벤트라도 자율 이동이 "커스텀"이면 움직이도록 합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: display the text of the story progress on the menu screen.

descriptions.en: display the text of the story progress on the menu screen.
descriptions.ja: メニュー画面に物語の進行を表すテキストを表示します。
descriptions.ko: 메뉴 화면에 스토리의 진행을 나타내는 텍스트를 표시합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: reset certain self-switches when the map is initialized.

descriptions.en: reset certain self-switches when the map is initialized.
descriptions.ja: マップの初期化時に特定のセルフスイッチをOFFにします。
descriptions.ko: 맵 초기화시에 특정 셀프스위치를 OFF로 합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: Preloads images, audio, and animations to reduce lag.

descriptions.en: Preloads images, audio, and animations to reduce lag.
descriptions.ja: 画像・音声・アニメーションを事前に読み込み、ラグを軽減します。
descriptions.ko: 이미지, 오디오, 애니메이션을 사전에 로드하여 지연을 줄입니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: テキストにルビを振ることができます。(Ver.2.0.2)

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: allows you to speed up the stepping and walking animation.

descriptions.en: allows you to speed up the stepping and walking animation.
descriptions.ja: キャラクターの足踏み・歩行アニメの速度を速められるようにします。
descriptions.ko: 캐릭터의 발 구르기 및 보행 애니메이션 속도를 빠르게 할 수 있습니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: play SE when a choices list is displayed.

descriptions.en: play SE when a choices list is displayed.
descriptions.ja: 選択肢の表示時にSEを演奏します。
descriptions.ko: 선택지가 표시될 때에 SE를 재생합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: stores the amount of money purchased and sold in "Shop Processing".

descriptions.en: stores the amount of money purchased and sold in "Shop Processing".
descriptions.ja: ショップの処理で購入・売却した金額をそれぞれ指定した変数に格納します。
descriptions.ko: "상점의 처리"에서 구매/판매한 금액을 각각 지정한 변수에 저장합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: implement the skill "Steal" items from enemy characters.

descriptions.en: implement the skill "Steal" items from enemy characters.
descriptions.ja: 敵キャラからアイテムを「盗む」スキルを実装できるプラグインです。
descriptions.ko: 적 캐릭터로부터 아이템을 훔치는 스킬을 만들 수 있는 플러그인입니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: switch the traits of states between actors and enemies.

descriptions.en: switch the traits of states between actors and enemies.
descriptions.ja: ステートの特徴をアクターか敵キャラかで切り替えられます。
descriptions.ko: 스탯의 특성을 액터인지 적 캐릭터인지로 전환할 수 있습니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: Execute a common event when getting on/off the vehicles.

descriptions.en: Execute a common event when getting on/off the vehicles.
descriptions.ja: 乗り物への乗降開始時・完了時・下船不可時にコモンイベントを実行します。
descriptions.ko: 탈 것에 승강 개시시, 완료시, 하선 불가시에 공통 이벤트를 실행합니다.

author: panda(werepanda.jp)
description: Change the calculation method of the required EXP to the VX method.

descriptions.en: Change the calculation method of the required EXP to the VX method.
descriptions.ja: 必要経験値の算出方法をVXの方式に変更します。
descriptions.ko: 필요 EXP(경험치) 산출 방법을 VX 방식으로 변경합니다.

author: 白
description: 「文章の表示」のウェイト中に、入力があればウェイトを無視してテキストを進めることができるようにします。

author: 白
description: レンダーテクスチャを使用し他のピクチャを転写する機能を追加するプラグイン（Ci-en実演用）

author: xks
description: コマンドリスト管理プラグイン

author: XthemeCore
description: เพิ่มภาษาไทยใน Name Input

author: XthemeCore
description: ปรับตัวอักษรภาษาไทยไปตามยถากรรม
